reviews.comment:
Soy socio,pero no paro más muy mala atención,es mas no me quisieron lavar el auto se negaron por más socio que seas.

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member, but I'm not going back because the service is terrible. They even refused to wash my car, no matter how much of a member I am.

reviews.comment:
Una pena que no tengan gas
Desde Santiago hasta rosario no hay gas en todo la ruta 34

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame they don't have gas. There's no gas along Route 34 from Santiago to Rosario.
